name: Chicken Breasts Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Seasoned dry bread crumbs, Fine
recipeInstructions:
1. On wax paper combine bread crumbs and 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese.
Dip the chicken breasts first in egg and then in bread crumb mixture until well coated.
2. Heat oil in a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic skillet over high heat on top of a conventional surface unit.
Quickly brown coated chicken pieces on both sides.
3. In a small bowl combine tomato sauce, Italian seasoning, and garlic salt.
Spoon the tomato sauce over the chicken.
4. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the tomato sauce.
5. Cover with wax paper and place in Microwave Oven for 5 to 6 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbly and the chicken is tender.
Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and continue heating uncovered in the Microwave Oven for an additional 30 seconds, or until the cheese is melted.
